properties.description: Alerts when 6 or more failed login attempts occur for the same user on the same device within 10 minutes.
properties.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event'
| where event_type_s == 'login_attempt'
| where success_b == false
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated),
    IPs = make_set(client_ip_s),
    Countries = make_set(geoip_country_code_s)
    by initiated_by_username_s, system_displayName_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where FailedAttempts >= 6
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    User = initiated_by_username_s,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    FailedAttempts,
    FirstAttempt,
    LastAttempt,
    IPs,
    Countries
